note: P31 latency diagnostics probe — first deployed end-to-end run. Desktop Chrome (Windows), 50 frames, 512px JPEG q0.6, vs prod Space. Verdict: network-dominated (~80% of RTT); server stable at benchmark (~58.6ms, p95 60.5) => Space tier upgrade ruled out; on-device inference selected as Phase 2 fix.
